generated_by: claude daily-research 2026-07-14 (CPI-day run, written ~14:40 Prague, minutes after the print)
market_context: THE gate day: June CPI printed at 14:30 (consensus looked for headline ~3.9% from 4.2%, core ~2.9% on a big gasoline drop) and five major banks reported the same morning — JPM delivered one of its largest beats ever (EPS 6.14 vs 5.85, revenue 58.0B vs 50.2B). First reaction: orderly — SPY ~749 (+0.1%), VIX 17.5, JPM recovered a -3% pre-market dip to flat; but the 10Y ticked to 4.61% and the day needs to close before the verdict is real. Deployment is therefore CLOSE-CONDITIONED: every trigger below reads off tonight's close, and tomorrow's run executes. Book: SKHY scalped +3.6% in 6 hours (the restructured listing trade ended green), AAPL TP1 hit at 318.07, 52% invested with 38.6k free awaiting the conditions. Also today: SpaceX's $86B IPO and Fed Chair Warsh's first Congressional testimony — a heavy tape day.

position_actions.action: DECISION AT THE CLOSE: monster beat + red close = exit the 0.6; green close above 340 = hold for 345+
position_actions.reason: The largest beat in recent JPM history should move the stock UP — if it closes red or flat on that news, the financials-rotation leg is exhausted (everyone who wanted in is in) and the framework's 'catalyst confirmed and priced in' rule says take the rest off. Green close above 340 keeps the 345 TP working with the buyback tailwind. This is a tonight decision, not a next-week one.

position_actions.action: CLOSED at 158.00 (+3.6%, +233 CZK in 6 hours) — re-entry mapped both ways
position_actions.reason: The listing trade ends green because the restructure bought at 152.5 instead of the 205 open — the full sequence (parity math -> patient limit -> quick scalp) is the playbook for the SpaceX IPO too. Re-entry: above a 160 daily close as a conscious long-hold conversion (60% HBM share), or below 148 as a near-parity value catch. Neither is urgent.

position_actions.action: HOLD — 7.12, four percent above the 6.85 stop; no interference
position_actions.reason: -633 CZK, the book's problem position. Catalysts (Cyberhawk Q3, defense flow) unchanged, chart unchanged, rule unchanged: the stop decides. Re-entry after a stop-out stays 7.70 + two green closes.

position_actions.action: TP1 DONE at 318.07; remaining 0.63 has the 330 limit but NO stop — swap after today's close
position_actions.reason: +141 CZK on the remainder. The 330 limit reserves all shares, leaving zero downside protection with earnings Jul 30 approaching. Recommendation: once today's CPI digestion is done, cancel the 330 limit and place a 302 stop (locks profit), treating 330 as a manual alert level — or accept consciously that this 4.7k slice trades stopless. The framework prefers the stop.

position_actions.reason: Back at the 190 level it first paid you at. Earnings Jul 29 — the size-down decision comes Friday Jul 24. Strongest position in the book.
Basing above 85 again. If the CPI verdict is risk-on, this is the highest-beta rocket in the book; the stop protects the other outcome.

Coiling under 50 for a second week. Patience is the position.
